channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping - all sorts of rubbish and appliance, 15th March
item.description:
Flytipping - all sorts of rubbish and appliance. Please could the rubbish be removed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish spilling out of unclaimed weeki bins, 15th March
item.description:
Bins that are left on street corner filled up with bags of rubbish that fall onto pavement and get ripped open if not removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Wingmore Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti at The Falcon Pub, 314 Kilburn Lane, 15th March
item.description:
Graffiti at The Falcon Pub, 314 Kilburn Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severly abraded markings on an enforced yellow box junction, 15th March
item.description:
The yellow box junction, known as High St Bromley (Sth)/Police Station (Box Jnc) has severely abraded and missing markings. This is especially the case at the southern end adjacent to the Waitrose Service Road exit onto the box junction where the yellow paint is completely missing either side of the gutter drain, see images. The markings are non-compliant and hazardous due to reflected glare in wet conditions (as shown in first image), especially at night, which creates an "optical illusion" from the motorist’s viewpoint, of a mirror effect off the road surface. This makes the markings and boundaries of the box junction difficult to see, from the motorists viewpoint, before entry into the box junction. The London Borough of Bromley enforces this box junction with CCTV and it continues to issue PCNs for “Di Minimis” infringements and derives “Unjust Enrichment” from them. This Box Junction needs repainting urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone left a wheel here., 15th March
item.description:
Someone left a wheel here. Been here for about a week now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trewsbury Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Flyposting at The Falcon Pub, 314 Kilburn Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London

item.title: Potholes multiple, 15th March
item.description:
More potholes in this road. Please fix them all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: No reflective bollard on road restriction, 15th March
item.description:
The restriction where you give way has no bollard. Just big lump concrete which i nearly went over. Woukd have caused accident. Emergency stop car behind just missed me
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on underpass wall, 15th March
item.description:
There is graffiti in the underpass walkway near Greenland Dock at the Tesco end. Please can this be cleaned off as soon as possible to avoid it being added to by the local ‘artists’. Thanks very much.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redriff Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat in our drive way, 15th March
item.description:
Dead cat in our drive way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned BMW, 15th March
item.description:
Someone had dumped this car and we only have 3 spaces for 18 flats. It doesn't belong to anyone who lives here. It's untaxed and no MOT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 15th March
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-13, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London

item.title: Double yellow line disappeared, 15th March
item.description:
Double yellow line designed for parking restrictions and to reduce congestion are disappearing. Cars have now parking on the spot very often during the day, obstructing the traffic.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): James Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light shine into house, 15th March
item.description:
54 rusper road we would like the street lamp to have a defector. That is to limit the light coming into the house at 54 rusper road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Rusper Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
